## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss content development progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/zrhy2sVcdLgnW_LdMNc5UrfK_YLLGQ23?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kendra's team is close to finalizing several pieces of online content, with some ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/zrhy2sVcdLgnW_LdMNc5UrfK_YLLGQ23?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [GrowthX has published 20 articles, with 15 more in progress, and is launching a V2 workflow for improved content quality](https://fathom.video/share/zrhy2sVcdLgnW_LdMNc5UrfK_YLLGQ23?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [A new AI enablement framework has been identified, potentially guiding future content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zrhy2sVcdLgnW_LdMNc5UrfK_YLLGQ23?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Initial metrics show 3 clicks and \~400 impressions for recently published articles](https://fathom.video/share/zrhy2sVcdLgnW_LdMNc5UrfK_YLLGQ23?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
